title: Full-Stack & Mobile Developer
description: Building and maintaining customer-facing banking and real estate platforms for Yakeey, a Moroccan real estate fintech. Full stack across React/TypeScript frontend, Flutter mobile apps, and Spring Boot backend services.
bullets: Built the landing page 'Financer mon projet' on yakeey.com.
Contributed to Yakeey-UI, a standardized reusable component library across all Yakeey platforms.
CIH Landing Front — Developed the dashboard enabling CIH agents to view, approve, or cancel real estate credit requests.
CIH Parcours Web — Maintained and improved the user credit request flow, guiding clients to input their information to obtain tailored credit offers.
Cockpit Front — Contributed to the platform allowing users to upload credit documents and experts to validate or reject requests based on eligibility.
CIH Mobile App (Flutter) — Designed and implemented the simulation and credit request module, including document upload and expert tracking.
Reduced manual client processing time by an estimated 20% for end-users and financial experts.

title: Freelance Full-Stack Developer
description: Designing and building PharmaGest — a full pharmacy management system for a Moroccan pharmacy client. Ongoing part-time freelance project running concurrently with full-time role at Yakeey.
bullets: Built FastAPI + SQLAlchemy backend with JWT authentication and role-based access control (Admin/Staff/Viewer).
Developed React + TypeScript + Refine + shadcn/ui frontend with full POS interface.
Implemented inventory management with batch/expiry tracking, low-stock alerts, and supplier management.
Added sales analytics dashboard and PDF/Excel report generation.

title: Frontend Developer
description: Short engagement at a startup incubator. Built a water purification MVP with real-time monitoring feedback and an intuitive user interface.
bullets: Developed a water purification MVP with real-time feedback and an intuitive ReactJS UI.
Implemented interactive Chart.js dashboards with live parameter monitoring and configurable alert thresholds.
Delivered process controls, maintenance scheduling, and compliance reporting features.

title: Backend Developer
description: Intensive engineering bootcamp at a high-frequency trading firm. Built production-quality low-latency trading systems in C++ with direct exposure to live market infrastructure.
bullets: Designed and implemented multi-threaded trading algorithms in C++, reducing order execution latency by 30%.
Built a full Deribit order execution system: WebSocket real-time orderbook, place/modify/cancel orders.
Optimized the core trading platform for better scalability, stability, and concurrent process management.
Developed Bash scripts to automate client request testing and simulate high-frequency trading scenarios under real conditions.

title: Software Developer (Freelance)
description: Developed a custom internal communication tool for a manufacturing company.
bullets: Built a desktop application for rotating team communication using Python Eel, JavaScript, and HTML/CSS.
Designed a modern, interactive interface adapted for daily cross-shift use.
Deployed the application for active use in a manufacturing environment.

title: Methods Preparation Technician
description: Managed manufacturing project scheduling and tooling design for aerospace clients including SAFRAN and Rolls-Royce.
bullets: Planned team tasks and project schedules using MS Project for aerospace part production.
Represented the technical team in meetings with clients such as Rolls-Royce and SAFRAN.
Created 2D/3D designs for control and manufacturing tools using TopSolid CAD.

title: CAD Trainer (Part-Time)
description: Taught 3D mechanical design to students at a digital engineering school.
bullets: Taught students the fundamentals of mechanical manufacturing and computer-aided design (CAD).
Instructed 3D modeling, assembly design, and technical drawing using SolidWorks and Catia.
Guided learners through real-world mechanical design projects from concept to final model.

title: CNC Machinist
description: Operated precision CNC machinery for aerospace component manufacturing.
bullets: Operated and programmed CNC machines for precision aerospace parts.
Maintained dimensional accuracy using precision instruments, adhering to strict aerospace quality standards.
Maintained and troubleshot CNC equipment to minimize production downtime.
